title: Mass Spectrometry Identification of Samples Separated by Liquid Chromatography
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ugoj","text":"As one of the most powerful separation and analysis technologies in the field of chemistry, liquid chromatography (LC) has developed rapidly since the 1970s. Both in terms of fundamental chromatography theory and instrument performance, it has been greatly improved and improved. steps: Sample purification. Wash the protein with acetone pre-cooled at -20°C to remove impurities.
